blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,005 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 14".
